summary: Hydrated state shows the original representative #66597 is already closed. The current live canonical issue is #66875, with open maintainer PR #72325 as the canonical fix path for the remaining WebChat final/reconciliation race. No close, merge, post-merge close, or new fix PR action is planned in this pass because #72325 is still open and has an unresolved Greptile P2 review note plus no passed Codex /review evidence in the artifact. Closed refs are kept closed only; unrelated/security refs are not mutated.
